strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across software, hardware, and infrastructure
Proven AI-agent and cloud infrastructure contributions (MCP, AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
Strong open-source leadership with real-world AI/geo-data platforms (GISCollective)
concerns: Resume uses name 'Szabo Bogdan' — potential mismatch with candidate name 'Aisha Okonkwo'
No explicit mention of Master's/PhD in AI, limiting preferred qualification alignment
Limited evidence of direct AI product development or strategic cloud platform leadership at director level
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates deep technical breadth, entrepreneurial initiative through GISCollective, and hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work — strong indicators of strategic engineering leadership. However, the name discrepancy raises red flags about resume authenticity, and while experience is extensive, direct evidence of AI product ownership or cloud strategy at a director level is underdeveloped.
